Government of Maharashtra
Department of Public Health
Government Decision Number: Numerical - 2025 / Q. 52 / Registration Branch
10th Floor, Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital Complex Building,
New Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400001.
Date: February 24, 2026.
The Proposal: -
Governance Process Re-engineering (GPR) of various government schemes and services
To make timely payment of honorarium to the contractual employees under the jurisdiction of the department.
The matter of appointing a study group to do so was under the consideration of the department.
The Government's Decisions:
The governance process of various services and schemes of the public health department is re-
To perform engineering (GPR) as well as timely payment of remuneration to the contractual employees under the department.
A study group is being appointed to do the following.
The above study group will make recommendations on the following mentioned topics.
(1) The governance process of the various services / schemes of the department by the study group is re-
Appropriate recommendations should be made for doing engineering (GPR).
(2) Services of the department for the study group to link to their government portal /
Plans should be recommended.
table_trans: Deputy Secretary (Finance & Accounts), Public Health Department, Mumbai
The representative of the whole organization
Cell Officer, (e-Governance), Department of Public Health, Mumbai.
Under Secretary (Registration Branch), Public Health Department, Mumbai.

para_trans: Government Decision Ranking: Numerical - 2025 / Q. 52 / Registration Branch
(3) The Study Group shall ensure timely payment of remuneration to the contractual employees under the jurisdiction of the Department.
Create a plan of action.
(4) Certain matters in connection with the other technical activities of the Department.
The study group should also make a recommendation if it is assigned to the study group.
3. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
